data.title: Elon Musk Says Tesla Doesn't Need Lidar Because 'People Don't Shoot Lasers Out Of Their Eyes' After YouTubers Put His Cars Through Wylie E. Coyote Tests
data.description: Despite Elon Musk's public dismissal of LiDAR as unnecessary for self-driving, Tesla quietly became the top customer of LiDAR supplier Luminar in 2024—just as China surged ahead in global LiDAR dominance.

data.title: Bitcoin Options Worth Over $12 Billion Set To Expire On Friday: Market Volatility Looming Large?
data.description: The cryptocurrency market could experience a major upheaval as investors brace for the expiry of over $12 billion worth of Bitcoin options on Friday, March 27.

data.title: Jim Cramer On Lululemon Optimism: 'Don't Know How They Could Be Pleased' As Stock Drops Over 10% In After-Hours Trading
data.description: Jim Cramer voiced skepticism about Lululemon Athletica Inc.'s latest earnings, posting on X, "I don't know how LULU could be pleased with how the quarter ended but not like how the next quarter began!"

data.title: Nvidia-Backed CoreWeave's IPO Comes In Below Expectations At $40 Per Share
data.description: CoreWeave priced its initial public offering at $40 per share, below the expected range of $47 to $55, signaling investor caution despite demand for artificial intelligence-driven cloud computing services.

data.title: Cathie Wood Sees Small Business Recovery Ahead, Tom Lee Predicts 'Extremely High' Odds Of A V-Shaped Market Rebound
data.description: ARK Invest CEO Cathie Wood believes small businesses are poised for a resurgence, despite facing prolonged struggles since the COVID-19 pandemic.
